title: athyrium filix-femina subsp. sinense
intro: Athyrium filix-femina subsp. sinense, also known as the Chinese lady fern or Sinensis lady fern, is a subspecies of the lady fern (Athyrium filix-femina) native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various diseases.
